features.description: Single-command bootstrap for a fresh Mac: installs Antigravity, Gemini Desktop, Claude Desktop, Claude Code CLI, antigravity CLI, gemini CLI, supporting Homebrew tooling, and places captured config files.
steps: scaffold configs/ scripts/ and setup.sh orchestrator
capture current-machine configs into configs/ with secret-stripping
install Homebrew formulae (node, gh, jq, ripgrep, shellcheck, shfmt)
install Claude Code CLI (curl) and Gemini CLI (npm global)
install GUI apps from official DMGs (Antigravity, Gemini, Claude)
link captured configs into OS locations with backup of pre-existing files

features.description: Debian/Ubuntu CLI-only path for setup.sh: OS detection, apt install stage, shared cross-platform CLI/link-configs/verify/auth-checklist scripts, GUI-app stage filtered out.
steps: OS-detection helper + setup.sh dispatch (macos | debian | else error)
scripts/install-apt.sh — NodeSource + gh apt repos, apt install + shfmt fallback
make scripts/install-clis.sh cross-platform (npm prefix, rc-file pick, Node-version guard)
link-configs.sh skip Mac-only Claude Desktop path on Debian
verify-install.sh skip GUI app + Mac-only-JSON checks on Debian
auth-checklist.sh trim Antigravity + Claude Desktop steps on Debian
docs: README Debian subsection + new docs/debian.md
